rom.notes: 2012/11/19 [Tactrix] Updated to standardized file naming. 2024 [Analysis] Corrected and extended table definitions from ROM binary analysis. 2025 [Ghidra] Reclassified 4x "Unknown Early 3D [f3a8/f3aa]" tables from Unknown/fuel-injector-guess to Transmission/TCU, based on confirmed disassembly tracing (see tcu_torque_target_ramp_calc, tcu_slip_control_init, tcu_rx_main_scheduler). Axis scaling for these 4 tables is still tentative -- only the subsystem identity changed. 2026-07 [Ghidra, session 3] RECLASSIFIED AGAIN, superseding the 2025 entry above: all 10 tables in the f3a8/f3aa/f3ac/f3ae/f3b0/f3b2 cluster (the 4 "TCU Torque Ramp Target" tables + the 6 "Open Loop Lambda ..." tables) are confirmed to be a single SHARED "Knock-to-TCU Torque Coordination" register group, category changed to Knock Control. Confirmed via matching enable-condition disassembly in both tcu_rx_main_scheduler and knock_process_main (identical RAM 0xf1f2 bit7 gate). This was checked specifically to rule out address aliasing/misidentification - see logging.txt session 3 "0xF3AC/0xF3AE CONFLICT - CONFIRMED INTENTIONAL" for the full resolution. Table names updated in place; old "Lambda ..." names kept parenthetically for continuity with prior tuning notes. Treat the AFR/uint8 scaling on the ex-Lambda tables as SUSPECT pending further work - the dual TCU/knock interpretation of the same bytes is confirmed, but which (if either) numeric scaling is correct is not yet resolved. 2026-07 [Ghidra, session 4] Octane Level (MUT 0x27, RAM 0xEEC8/EEC9) decay-vs-knock mechanism confirmed and documented in RVR_base.xml's shared notes section - this is the "knock retard" equivalent on this ECU (no discrete retard-degrees value exists). See RVR_base.xml notes and logging.txt session 4 for full detail. ROM ID: 21 00 00 11 at file offset 0x021A. XML address = file_offset + 0x10000. Key axes confirmed from ROM data: RPM axis @2d2b0: 500-7000 RPM (14 elem), @2d332: 0-11000 RPM (18 elem) Load axis @2d308: 10-260% (18 elem), @2d382: 0-260% (19 elem) Temp axis @2d418: -32 to 82C (8 elem), @2d42e: -32 to 82C (9 elem) Battery axis @2d27a: 9.4-18.7V (9 elem) Boost Error axis @2d59c: -20 to +17.5% (16 elem) Ignition maps confirmed: signed byte = degrees, rows=RPM cols=Load Fuel maps confirmed: AFR = 14.7*128/x (stoichiometric = 0x80 = 14.7 AFR)

table.name: Decel Fuel Cut Resume RPM Offset
